mano_cua.result_summary: Shift+Tab完全未实现反向导航。Tab正向移动正常(Apple→Google→iCal→...)，但Shift+Tab行为与Tab完全相同（向下移动而非向上）。从iCal(3rd)按Shift+Tab移到Microsoft 365(4th)而非Google(2nd)。连续4次Shift+Tab均向下移动：iCal→M365→Outlook→Yahoo→Apple(循环)。焦点指示器(蓝色文字)本身显示正常。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: Shift+Tab acts identically to Tab (moves forward instead of backward). The event handler likely doesn't check shiftKey state.

deploy_notes: commit 6fb29a605a. Static HTML test page with dist/atcb.js via http-server on port 3000.
